headline: Stocks Rally as President Trump Signs a Preliminary Deal to End the US-Iran War
summary: The S&P 500 Index ($SPX ) (SPY ) today is up +0.73%, the Dow Jones Industrial Average ($DOWI ) (DIA ) is up +0.53%, and the Nasdaq 100 Index ($IUXX ) (QQQ ) is up +1.62%. June E-mini S&P futures (ESM26 ) are up +0.80%, and June E-mini Nasdaq futures...

headline: Should Investors Hold or Fold Carnival Stock Ahead of Q2 Earnings?
summary: Can CCL's record bookings, high pricing and rising onboard spending power a strong Q2 despite fuel-cost pressure?

headline: Carnival Cruise Line and MSC Cruises raise controversial cruise fee
summary: As a frequent cruiser, I've stopped noticing the difference between various fees depending upon what cruise line I'm sailing on. Yes, I'll notice that MSC Cruises offers much cheaper drink packages than Royal Caribbean or Carnival Cruise Line, but smaller things like the price of a cup of coffee, ...
